title: Transaction Rules
description: Automatically categorise, tag, and enrich transactions during import using custom rules.
loadError: Failed to load rules. Please try again.

list.emptyDescription: Create your first rule to automatically categorise and enrich imported transactions.
list.name: Name

delete.title: Delete Rule
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete the rule "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

form.name: Rule Name
form.priorityHint: Lower numbers run first (0 = highest priority).
form.conditionsHint: All conditions must match for the rule to fire (AND logic).
form.actionsHint: Actions applied when all conditions match.

errors.nameTooLong: Rule name must not exceed 100 characters.
errors.nameDuplicate: A rule with this name already exists.
errors.conditionRequired: At least one condition is required.
errors.conditionValueRequired: All conditions must have a value.
errors.actionRequired: At least one action is required.
errors.actionValueRequired: All actions must have a value.
errors.saveFailed: Failed to save rule. Please try again.

conditions.empty: No conditions added yet. Add at least one condition.

actions.empty: No actions added yet. Add at least one action.
actions.skipTransactionHint: Transaction will be skipped during import.
